narrative:
Sheffield Twp township has 993 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.3 percentage points.
